package rulecoverage

func NegativeDateOrCastWrappedIndexedColumn() string {
    ruleID := "date_or_cast_wrapped_indexed_column"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "DATE/CAST wrapping indexed columns in WHERE clauses, preventing index usage."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
